name: Gado Gado i (Mixed Vegetables with Peanut Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green Beans, cut into 1-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a sauce by mixing peanut butter, garlic, sugar, coconut milk, lemon juice, and salt in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes. If the sauce is too thick, add water as needed.
3. In a large pot or wok, bring water to a boil. Add sliced cabbage, carrots, green beans, and spinach. Cook for about 20 minutes until vegetables are tender.
4. One minute before the vegetables are done cooking, add bean sprouts. Stir briefly, then drain excess water.
5. Transfer cooked vegetables to a large serving plate.
6. Garnish with sliced potatoes, sliced eggs, sliced cucumber, onion flakes, and Shrimp Puffs.
7. Serve with peanut sauce on the side.
